title: Dust collection attachment for a drilling machine and method thereof
abstract: The dust collector assembly (1, 3, 4, 6, 7) offers a simple arrangement for removable attachment to a drilling machine; and working in conjunction with the drilling operation of the machine. The dust collector assembly comprises a dust collector housing (1) enclosing a propeller (4) therein. The propeller is mounted rigidly on a shaft end of a clutch (3) that is mounted on the dust collector housing using a ball bearing (2). There is further provided a gasket (6) attached to a wall facing side (W) of the dust collector housing; a dust collection chamber (C) for receiving and collecting dust and debris generated from drilling operation; and a removable cap (7) for disposing off the collected dust and debris from the dust collection chamber (C).
